control.visible: Container.Content(movies) | Container.Content(sets) | Container.Content(tvshows) | Container.Content(seasons) | Container.Content(episodes) | $EXP[IsPluginApplePodcasts] | Container.Content(favourites) | Window.IsVisible(MyGames.xml) | $EXP[IsGameMode]

![Container.Content(directors) | Container.Content(actors) | Container.Content(countries) | Container.Content(years) | Container.Content(genres) | Container.Content(tags) | Container.Content(studios)]

String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre),Science Fiction) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre),Sci-Fi) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre),خيال علمي) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre),الخيال العلمي) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.1.Name),Science Fiction) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.1.Name),Sci-Fi) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.1.Name),خيال علمي) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.1.Name),الخيال العلمي) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.2.Name),Science Fiction) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.2.Name),Sci-Fi) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.2.Name),خيال علمي) | String.Contains(Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Genre.2.Name),الخيال العلمي) | String.Contains(Container($PARAM[id]).ListItem.Genre,Science Fiction) | String.Contains(Container($PARAM[id]).ListItem.Genre,Sci-Fi) | String.Contains(Container($PARAM[id]).ListItem.Genre,خيال علمي) | String.Contains(Container($PARAM[id]).ListItem.Genre,الخيال العلمي)
